rules.section: Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector, s.17
rules.reason: Quebec Law 25 (formerly Bill 64) requires a privacy impact assessment before personal information is communicated outside Quebec, and the recipient must offer protection equivalent to that under Quebec law.
rules.remediation_hint: Conduct a documented PIA; add equivalent-protection warranties from the recipient; appoint a Privacy Officer and disclose their contact information.
